title: Varangaon Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Varangaon with a Z-Score of +5.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Varangaon is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 17.0 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25% and the wind speed is moderate at 18.3 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
